responsibilities.entry: Implement OpenAI API integrations using official OpenAI documentation.
Prefer Responses API for modern model generation where appropriate.
Keep tools, retrieval, structured outputs and side effects explicit and validated.
Design retry, error, timeout and fallback behaviour.

constraints.entry: Do not invent OpenAI API parameters, model capabilities, safety guarantees, rate limits or retention behaviour.
Do not commit API keys or secrets.
Do not rely on model output as trusted application logic without validation.
